metadata.website_type: cultural food and music festival website

tasks.name: Purchase the cheapest 2-day festival pass plus 1 child pass with mobile delivery under $260
tasks.description: Buy one adult 2-day festival pass and one child pass for the same dates, selecting the cheapest seating/tier combination that keeps the total ticket cost under $260, and choose mobile/e-ticket delivery instead of mail.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage
Click on the main navigation link labeled "Tickets"
On the tickets page, select the "2-Day Pass" option for adults and set the quantity to 1 in the quantity field
In the same tickets section, locate the "Child Pass" option, set the quantity to 1, and ensure it is for the same 2-day dates as the adult pass

Use the tier or section dropdown for each ticket type to sort or filter options by price and choose the cheapest available tier/section for both the adult and child passes that keeps the combined total ticket price under $260
Click the "Add to Cart" or equivalent button to add both selected tickets to the cart
Click on the cart icon or "View Cart" button in the header to go to the cart page
On the cart or checkout page, select the delivery method option labeled "Mobile Ticket" or "E-ticket" instead of any mail or physical delivery option
Click the "Proceed to Checkout" or "Continue" button to reach the payment details step (without completing any real payment)

tasks.name: Build a Sunday music schedule with 3 performances from different stages between 2:00 PM and 10:00 PM
tasks.description: Create a personal schedule for Sunday by adding exactly three music performances happening between 2:00 PM and 10:00 PM, making sure each performance is on a different stage.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage
Click on the main navigation item labeled "Schedule" or "Lineup"
On the schedule page, use the day selector to choose "Sunday"
Use the time filter controls to limit visible events to those starting between 2:00 PM and 10:00 PM on Sunday
From the filtered results, select the first performance you see on one stage (e.g., "Main Stage") and click its card to open the event details
On the event details page, click the button labeled "Add to My Schedule" or similar to add this performance to your personal schedule

Return to the Sunday schedule view and choose two additional performances that start between 2:00 PM and 10:00 PM and are each on stages different from the ones already selected; for each, open the event details and click "Add to My Schedule"
Click on the "My Schedule" or "My Plan" link in the header or account menu to open your personal schedule overview page

tasks.name: Create a tasting list with 3 vegetarian main dishes from different cuisines under $15 and rated 4+ stars
tasks.description: Find vegetarian main dishes from food vendors, each priced under $15 and with a rating of at least 4.0 stars, select dishes from three different cuisines, and add them to your tasting or favorites list.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage
Click on the navigation link labeled "Food" or "Vendors" to open the food vendor listings
Use the category or dish type filter to show only "Mains" or equivalent main-course items
Apply a dietary filter to show only "Vegetarian" dishes
Use the price filter to set the maximum price to $15 and apply the filter
Use the rating filter or sort control to show only items with a rating of 4.0 stars or higher
From the filtered list, select the first main dish you see from one cuisine (e.g., "Mexican"), click its product card to open details, and click the "Add to Tasting List" or "Add to Favorites" button

Return to the filtered results and choose two additional vegetarian main dishes, each from a different cuisine than the ones already selected, opening each dish detail page and clicking "Add to Tasting List" or "Add to Favorites"
Click on the "Tasting List" or "Favorites" link or icon in the header to open the list containing the three selected dishes

tasks.name: Register for a free intermediate dance workshop on Saturday that starts before 3:00 PM
tasks.description: Find a dance workshop on Saturday that is marked as free, tagged as intermediate level, and scheduled to start before 3:00 PM, then complete the on-site registration form for that specific workshop.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage
Click on the main navigation link labeled "Workshops" or "Activities"
On the workshops page, use the category or type filter to select "Dance"
Use the day filter to select "Saturday" and apply a time filter to show only workshops starting before 3:00 PM
Apply a price filter and choose the option labeled "Free" or set the maximum price to $0
Use the level filter to select "Intermediate" and view the filtered list of workshops
From the filtered results, click on the first workshop that matches all criteria to open its detail page
On the workshop detail page, click the "Register" or "Sign Up" button to open the registration form

Fill in the registration form with a name (e.g., "Alex Taylor"), an email address (e.g., "alex@example.com"), and a phone number (e.g., "555-123-4567"), then click the "Submit" or "Complete Registration" button

tasks.name: Create a 'Saturday Night' lineup list with 2 headliners and 3 local artists performing after 6:00 PM
tasks.description: Build a custom 'Saturday Night' lineup by saving two headliner artists and three local artists who all have performances starting after 6:00 PM on Saturday into a personal favorites or playlist list.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage
Click on the navigation item labeled "Lineup" or "Artists"
On the lineup page, use the day filter to select "Saturday" and apply a time filter to show only performances starting after 6:00 PM

Use the artist type filter or tags to show "Headliner" artists first and add the first two headliner artists in the filtered list to your favorites or lineup by clicking their detail cards and then clicking "Add to Favorites" or "Add to Lineup"
Return to the filtered lineup and adjust the artist type filter or tags to show "Local" or "Emerging" artists
From the list of local artists performing after 6:00 PM, select the first three artists, open each artist’s detail page, and click "Add to Favorites" or "Add to Lineup" for each
Click on the "My Lineup", "My Artists", or similar link in the header or account menu to view your saved artists
Within your saved artists or lineup area, create or rename a list as "Saturday Night" and move or tag the 5 selected artists so they appear under this "Saturday Night" list

tasks.name: Make a $25 on-site donation to the 'Youth Music Education' fund using the credit card option and opt in to the newsletter
tasks.description: Use the festival website’s donation page to select a preset or custom donation amount of exactly $25, choose the 'Youth Music Education' fund, select 'Credit Card' as the payment method (without processing a real payment), and opt in to receive the festival newsletter.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage
Click on the navigation link labeled "Donate" or "Support"
On the donation page, either select the preset $25 amount or type "25" into the custom amount field
Use the fund or campaign dropdown to select the option labeled "Youth Music Education"
In the payment method section, select the "Credit Card" option without entering real card details beyond any sample text required by the form (e.g., placeholder values)
Fill in the donor information fields with a name (e.g., "Jordan Smith") and an email address (e.g., "jordan@example.com")
Check or toggle the option that says "Subscribe to Newsletter" or similar to opt in to festival email updates
Click the "Continue", "Review", or "Submit Donation" button to finalize the on-site donation form without needing any external confirmation

tasks.name: Plan 2 family-friendly kids activities on Sunday afternoon with 4.5+ star ratings
tasks.description: Identify two kids-focused activities happening on Sunday between 12:00 PM and 5:00 PM that are marked as family-friendly and rated at least 4.5 stars, then add both activities to a 'Family Plan' list or schedule.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage
Click on the navigation link labeled "Activities" or "Family"
On the activities page, use the day filter to select "Sunday" and set the time filter to show activities between 12:00 PM and 5:00 PM
Apply a category or tag filter to show only "Kids", "Children", or "Family-Friendly" activities
Use the rating filter to show only activities with ratings of 4.5 stars or higher
From the filtered results, click on the first two distinct activities that meet all criteria, one at a time, to open their detail pages
On each activity detail page, click the "Add to Family Plan", "Add to My Schedule", or similar button to save the activity
Open the "My Schedule", "Family Plan", or equivalent page from the header or account menu to view the two selected activities together

tasks.name: Pin 3 nearby food stalls (main, dessert, drink) within a short walking distance from the Main Stage on the festival map
tasks.description: Using the interactive festival map, find three different food stalls near the Main Stage—one serving mains, one serving desserts, and one serving drinks—that are each marked as being within a 3-minute walk or designated 'nearby' radius, and pin all three to your personal map or route.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage
Click on the navigation link labeled "Map" or "Festival Map"
On the map, use the search or location list to locate and center the view on the "Main Stage"
Enable or open the map filter to display only food vendors and then use category filters to show all food types around the Main Stage

From the vendors appearing near the Main Stage, identify one vendor categorized as serving mains (e.g., "Meals" or "Entrees") within the indicated 3-minute walk or "Nearby" radius, click its map marker or name, and click "Pin" or "Add to Route"
Adjust the category filter to show dessert vendors and select one dessert stall within the same nearby radius around the Main Stage, then click its marker and use the "Pin" or "Add to Route" option
Adjust the category filter again to show drink or beverage vendors and select one drink stall within the nearby radius around the Main Stage, clicking its marker and then "Pin" or "Add to Route"
Open the "My Map", "Saved Locations", or "My Route" panel associated with the map to view your pinned spots
In the saved locations panel, arrange the three pinned stalls in the order: mains first, dessert second, drinks third, using any available drag-and-drop or ordering controls

entities.name: TicketType

fields.name: valid_days
fields.description: Array of day enums such as 'friday', 'saturday', 'sunday'

entities.description: Types of festival tickets and passes (e.g., 2-day adult pass, child pass)

entities.name: TicketTier
entities.description: Pricing tiers/sections for each ticket type (e.g., GA, VIP) used to find cheapest options

entities.name: Cart

fields.name: items
fields.description: Array of CartItem ids or embedded cart item objects

entities.description: Shopping cart holding selected tickets before checkout

entities.name: CartItem
entities.description: Line items within the cart representing selected tickets and quantities

entities.name: CheckoutSession
entities.description: Checkout context capturing chosen delivery method and purchaser details before payment

entities.name: Stage
entities.description: Performance stages at the festival (e.g., Main Stage, secondary stages)

entities.name: Artist
entities.description: Artists and bands in the festival lineup, including headliners and local acts

entities.name: Performance

fields.name: name
fields.description: Optional performance title; artist name can also be used

entities.description: Scheduled performances with day, time and stage for use in Schedule and Lineup views

entities.name: MyScheduleItem
entities.description: Entries in the single-user personal schedule (My Schedule)

entities.name: Vendor
entities.description: Food vendors at the festival, linked to their map locations and dishes

entities.name: Dish

fields.name: dietary_tags
fields.description: Array of dietary label strings such as 'vegetarian', 'vegan'

entities.description: Individual dishes offered by vendors, used for price, rating, cuisine and dietary filtering

entities.name: TastingListItem
entities.description: Dishes saved to the single-user Tasting List / Favorites

entities.name: Activity
entities.description: Non-performance activities and workshops, including dance classes and kids/family activities

entities.name: WorkshopRegistration
entities.description: On-site registration submissions for specific workshops (e.g., intermediate dance workshop)

entities.name: FamilyPlanItem
entities.description: Activities saved into the Family Plan / My Schedule for kids and family-friendly planning

entities.name: ArtistFavorite
entities.description: Artists saved to the single-user favorites / lineup collection

entities.name: ArtistList

fields.name: description
fields.description: Optional note such as 'Custom Saturday Night lineup'

entities.description: Named artist groupings within My Lineup (e.g., a list named 'Saturday Night')

entities.name: ArtistListItem
entities.description: Membership of artists within a specific custom lineup list

entities.name: MapLocation

fields.name: walking_time_from_main_stage
fields.description: Approximate walking time in minutes from the Main Stage

entities.description: Spatial points on the festival map, including stages and food stalls with proximity info

entities.name: SavedMapLocation

fields.name: route_order
fields.description: Ordering index for routes (e.g., mains first, dessert second, drinks third)

entities.description: Pinned locations/routes on the festival map for the single user

entities.name: DonationFund

fields.name: suggested_amounts
fields.description: Array of suggested numeric donation amounts (e.g., [25, 50, 100])

entities.description: Donation funds/campaigns such as 'Youth Music Education'

entities.name: Donation
entities.description: Donation submissions made via the Donate page, including fund, amount, and newsletter opt-in

entities.name: NewsletterSubscription
entities.description: Record of newsletter opt-in status for the single user, including how they subscribed
